meaning: v.说服,劝说,(使)相信,劝某人做(不做)某事
examples: I did my damnedest to persuade her.
How did you manage to persuade him?
I failed in my attempt to persuade her.
It tries to persuade local people to grow their own food and eat more healthily.
Even if he can't win in court, he'll persuade the Senate to back off.
